title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Log out - Cancel
scenario: Account login/logout flow: Cancel option in logout dialog keeps user logged in on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app as a guest user.
2. Tap the hamburger icon (☰) to open App Settings.
4. Tap Log in and enter valid credentials.
5. Observe the Account screen after successful login.
8. Tap Cancel on the confirmation dialog.
expected:
1. After step 5: \"Your account\" text is visible with Name and Email fields populated.
2. After step 6: A login confirmation dialog opens with Cancel and Continue options.
3. After step 8: The dialog disappears and the user remains logged in (Name and Email fields still populated).
